goal: MyPlantsPage fetches and displays real plants; users can create new plants with images.
summary: MyPlantsPage & Add Plant phase complete. MyPlantsPage now fetches real plants via usePlants query, replacing the hardcoded mock array. Added loading state and empty state. Built a bottom Sheet add-plant form with react-hook-form + zod validation (nickname required, optional species/scientific_name/water_frequency_days/light_requirement/notes). Integrated image upload via useUpload hook with preview, using capture="environment" for mobile camera. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Wire MyPlantsPage to use usePlants query, replacing the hardcoded plants array [verified]
  2. Build an AddPlantSheet component (react-hook-form + zod) with fields: nickname, species, scientific_name, water_frequency_days, light_requirement, notes, and image upload [verified]
  3. Integrate image upload into the add-plant form using useUpload with preview [verified]
  4. Type-check after UI changes [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 verified usePlants wiring via grep (2 matches). Step 2 verified useForm, zodResolver, Sheet via grep (11 matches). Step 3 verified useUpload import/usage via grep (2 matches) and tsc 0 errors. Step 4 verified tsc 0 errors. All verifications concrete.
gateVerdicts.evidence: grep counts: usePlants(2), useForm/zodResolver/Sheet(11), useUpload(2). tsc: 0 errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: MyPlantsPage displays real data and users can add plants with a form. The query hooks from Phase 1 are consumed successfully. The output (working MyPlantsPage) feeds into Phase 3 (PlantDetailPage needs plant data to display).
gateVerdicts.evidence: MyPlantsPage.tsx uses usePlants, useAddPlant, and useUpload. Form submits real data to Supabase.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Calendar and Journal tabs in MyPlantsPage are placeholders — wiring them to real care_logs data is part of Phase 3 scope (Plant Detail & HomePage Tasks).
gateVerdicts.evidence: Calendar and journal tabs remain static mock data by design; full care log integration is in Phase 3.
